skill1.kitLine: Activates at the start of battle and when using Burst Skill. Affects all allies. Issues 1 ticket, up to a maximum of 2. This effect is continuous. Ticket effect: Max HP ▲ number of tickets * 10% of the skill user's Max HP.
skill1.note: Modeled at derived steady-state cap: 2 tickets × 10% = 20%. Starts at 1 ticket (10%), reaches 2 after first Burst cast; only consume is S2 emergency heal which never fires under scope-lock. ⚑3: in a team that never Full Bursts she stays at 1 ticket (10%).

skill1.kitLine: Activates when entering Full Burst. Affects all allies. Cooldown of Burst Skill ▼ 7.48 sec.
skill1.note: Trigger read literally as team-FB entry (regardless of who bursted). 40s burst CD → ~32.5s effective team cadence.

skill1.kitLine: Activates when entering Full Burst. Affects all allies. Removes First Train Discount.
skill1.note: Pure ticket-economy bookkeeping (toggles whether S2 emergency heal consumes a ticket). No damage, no stat, no modeled consumer; inert under scope-lock because the consuming heal never fires anyway.

skill2.kitLine: Activates when the HP of anyone in the squad is lower than 15%. Affects the target if the target has any tickets. Recovers 12.27% of the skill user's final Max HP as HP. Ticket count ▼ 1.
skill2.note: Emergency heal: schema has no HP-threshold TriggerDef and sim models no incoming boss damage, so the trigger condition never exists in-sim. Wiring it to any available trigger would FABRICATE recovery events (measured > fudge). Recovery-consumer synergy is served by the Burst heal which fires reliably every rotation.

skill2.kitLine: Activates at the start of battle. Affects all allies. First Train Discount for 6 sec. Function: The effects of I'll Help You Board the Train! will not consume tickets.
skill2.note: Ticket-consumption bookkeeping gating the S2 emergency heal that never fires under scope-lock. No damage path.

burst.kitLine: Affects all allies. Recovers 32.26% of the skill user's final Max HP as HP.
burst.note: Fires every rotation she bursts (B1 opener). Drives any teammate 'when recovery takes effect' consumer (Crown-style). HP amount is event-only by engine design.

documentedConfounds.text: skill1: ticket Max-HP grant modeled at steady-state cap (2 tickets = 20%); starts at 1 ticket (10%), reaches 2 only after first Burst — in a team that never Full Bursts it stays 10% (⚑3)
documentedConfounds.why: Ally-granted Max HP is currently inert for damage (atkOfMaxHpPct counts a unit's OWN Max HP only). No HP-scaling consumer exists in-sim, so the 10% vs 20% difference produces zero damage delta. Kept for future consumer fidelity.

documentedConfounds.text: skill1: cadence tuple (SG rate of fire, reloadFrames 111) is the unverified datamine (⚑1)
documentedConfounds.why: Her only damage is base SG spray. If the real fire rate or reload gap differs from datamine, every normal-attack damage tick shifts. No charFixes applied — raw datamine shipped.

documentedConfounds.text: skill1: per-unit SG pellet landing is unmeasured; class SG_LANDING_BY_BAND table is the shipped default (⚑2)
documentedConfounds.why: SG landing is per-unit in the engine. If her pellet distribution differs from the class default band table, hit-count and thus total damage changes. Directly affects the only damage source.

documentedConfounds.text: skill2: emergency heal (squad HP < 15%, consumes ticket) is unmodeled — sim models no incoming boss damage, schema has no HP-threshold trigger
documentedConfounds.why: No incoming damage in scope-lock sim → trigger never fires. Recovery-consumer synergy is served by the Burst heal which fires every rotation. No damage line is lost.

documentedConfounds.text: BURST-ELIGIBILITY: as a lone/enabler-less unit she makes ZERO full bursts — S1 blk2 (burstCdr), the burst heal, and the 2nd ticket all never happen; solo damage is unchanged (no FB-gated damage lines)
documentedConfounds.why: Correctly documents that FB-gated effects are inert in solo play. No damage lines are FB-gated, so solo DPS is unaffected. Relevant only for team-context interpretation.

documentedConfounds.text: PARSER BASELINE banner: every ⚑ is an UNMEASURED estimate; hand-tune + record against a real fight before trusting any number
documentedConfounds.why: The entire override is explicitly a hypothesis, not a validated model. All numeric values (cadence, landing, steady-state) are unverified against gameplay.

authorIntentSummary: The author modeled Soline: Frost Ticket as a zero-damage-kit Burst-I Supporter whose only DPS is base SG spray (normalMult 201.5, hitsPerShot 10, ammo 9). Two skill1 blocks are modeled: a passive casterMaxHpPct 20 buff (steady-state 2-ticket cap, currently inert for damage) and a fullBurstEnter burstCdr 7.48 team cadence lever. The burst heal is modeled as a recovery event to drive teammate consumers. The entire S2 (emergency HP-threshold heal + First Train Discount bookkeeping) and S1's 'Removes First Train Discount' are deliberately unmodeled as inert under scope-lock (no incoming damage, no HP-threshold trigger in schema). The override is explicitly a PARSER BASELINE hypothesis — all cadence, landing, and ticket-trajectory values are unmeasured datamine/derived estimates flagged with ⚑.
